session.conflict: Your session has a conflict. Click below to clear it and log in again.
home.hero.body: Camel Global connects your car hire business directly with customers who need a vehicle delivered to them. You set the price, we bring you the work. No monthly fees. No lock-in. Works alongside your existing operation from day one.
home.stats.commissionLabel: Starting commission on hire price only
home.stats.fuelLabel: Fuel charge to nearest ¼ tank passed to you
home.nodisruption.title: Works alongside your existing business
home.nodisruption.body: Camel Global isn't a replacement for how you work — it's an additional channel. You continue running your existing operation exactly as you do today. The Camel platform simply brings you extra bookings from customers you wouldn't otherwise reach. You choose which requests to bid on, and when.
home.nodisruption.item1: Keep your existing booking system and customers
home.nodisruption.item2: Only bid on jobs that suit your availability
home.nodisruption.item3: Your drivers use a simple app — no complex integration
home.nodisruption.item4: Set your own service radius to match your capacity
home.nodisruption.item5: No exclusive agreements — you're not locked in
home.how.title: From request to payout in 6 steps
home.how.step1.title: Customer submits a request
home.how.step1.body: A customer enters their pickup location, drop-off point, dates, and vehicle type on the Camel Global customer site. The request is live instantly.
home.how.step2.title: You receive the request
home.how.step2.body: Every verified partner within the customer's chosen radius receives the request. You see full details and decide whether to bid.
home.how.step3.title: You place a bid
home.how.step3.body: Submit your price for the hire. You set the rate — we don't dictate pricing. The customer sees all bids side by side and picks the one that works for them.
home.how.step4.title: Booking confirmed
home.how.step4.body: When the customer accepts your bid, the booking is confirmed instantly. Your partner portal updates. You assign a driver and the job is ready.
home.how.step5.title: Driver delivers and collects
home.how.step5.body: Your driver delivers the car to the customer's location. Fuel levels are recorded at handover and collection to the nearest quarter tank via the driver app.
home.how.step6.title: Payout calculated automatically
home.how.step6.body: When the hire ends, the customer pays only for the fuel used to the nearest quarter tank. You receive: hire price minus commission, plus 100% of the fuel charge.
home.included.title: Everything you need to run your bookings
home.included.bookings.title: Booking management
home.included.bookings.body: View every confirmed booking in one place. See full details, customer info, and booking status at a glance.
home.included.fleet.title: Fleet management
home.included.fleet.body: Add and manage your vehicles by category. Keep your fleet list accurate and always up to date.
home.included.driver.title: Driver portal
home.included.driver.body: Your drivers get their own login. They see assigned jobs, record fuel levels, and confirm insurance document handover — all from their phone.
home.included.fuel.title: Automatic fuel billing
home.included.fuel.body: Fuel is recorded at delivery and collection, rounded to the nearest quarter tank. The charge is calculated automatically — no manual maths, no disputes.
home.included.reports.title: Revenue reports
home.included.reports.body: Full financial reporting with commission and fuel breakdowns. Export to Excel for your records or accountant.
home.included.notifications.title: Instant notifications
home.included.notifications.body: Get notified the moment a new request lands in your area. Never miss a bid window.
home.included.ai.title: AI help widget
home.included.ai.body: Your team can ask the Camel Help assistant questions about bookings, the platform, or policies — right inside the portal.
home.included.currency.title: Multi-currency
home.included.currency.body: Full support for EUR, GBP, and USD. Bill your customers in the currency that works for your market.
home.included.terms.title: Terms & operating rules
home.included.terms.body: Read, download, and reference your partner agreement and operating rules any time from your account.
home.pricing.title: Simple, transparent fees
home.pricing.body1: We charge a commission on the car hire price only. Fuel charges — calculated to the nearest quarter tank of actual usage — pass through to you at 100%. We never take a cut of the fuel.
home.pricing.body2: The starting commission rate is 20% of the hire price, subject to a minimum of €10 per booking. Commission rates can be reduced at Camel's discretion for partners with higher booking volumes — speak to us once you're live.
home.pricing.body3.end: . Settled automatically and paid directly to your bank account.
home.pricing.row1.label: Hire price
home.pricing.row1.note: What the customer pays for the car hire
home.pricing.row2.label: Camel commission (20%)
home.pricing.row3.label: Fuel charge (actual usage)
home.pricing.row3.note: 100% passed to you — no commission taken
home.pricing.row4.label: Your payout
home.pricing.row4.note: Paid directly to your bank account
home.pricing.disclaimer: Example only. Actual figures depend on your agreed rate and booking value.
home.insurance.title: Your responsibilities on every hire
home.insurance.body: Every Camel Global booking carries clear insurance and documentation requirements. These are non-negotiable and apply to every hire regardless of length or value.
home.insurance.box1.title: Fully comprehensive cover is mandatory.
home.insurance.box1.body: Every vehicle delivered through the platform must be covered by fully comprehensive insurance at the time of hire — not a damage waiver or excess-based product. The insurance document must be physically handed to the customer by the driver at the point of collection. The driver confirms this handover in the app, and the customer confirms receipt. Both confirmations are recorded on the booking.
home.insurance.box2.title: Check the customer's licence before handing over the keys.
home.insurance.box2.body: If your insurance policy or local regulations require a copy of the customer's driving licence, it is the partner's responsibility to request and retain this at the point of vehicle handover. Your driver should not hand over the vehicle until any required licence documentation has been checked and recorded. Camel Global does not collect or store driving licence data on your behalf.
home.eligibility.title: What you need to apply
home.eligibility.item1.title: A registered car hire business
home.eligibility.item1.body: You must operate as a legal entity — sole trader, S.L., S.A. or equivalent. We verify this during onboarding.
home.eligibility.item2.title: Valid licences and permits
home.eligibility.item2.body: All licences and permits required to operate a car hire business in your jurisdiction must be current and maintained.
home.eligibility.item3.title: Public liability insurance
home.eligibility.item3.body: Minimum €5,000,000 public liability cover required. All vehicles must be fully and comprehensively insured at the time of any hire.
home.eligibility.item4.title: A physical fleet base
home.eligibility.item4.body: You must have a base address from which vehicles can be dispatched. Used to match you with customers in range.
home.eligibility.item5.title: At least one active vehicle
home.eligibility.item5.body: Your fleet must have at least one active, roadworthy vehicle on the platform to start receiving requests.
home.eligibility.item6.title: A VAT or tax number
home.eligibility.item6.body: Required for commission invoicing and account activation.
home.cancellation.title: Clear rules. No surprises
home.cancellation.col1.label: Customer cancels >48hrs before pickup
home.cancellation.col1.note: You had enough notice to re-list the vehicle.
home.cancellation.col2.label: Customer cancels <48hrs before pickup
home.cancellation.col2.payout: You keep the hire fee minus commission
home.cancellation.col2.note: You reserved the vehicle — you're compensated for that.
home.cancellation.col3.label: You cancel a confirmed booking
home.cancellation.col3.note: Partner cancellations are a breach of the operating rules and may result in suspension.
home.apply.title: Apply in under 5 minutes
home.apply.body: Our signup process is quick and straightforward. Once approved, you can start bidding on customer requests immediately.
home.apply.step1.title: Fill in your details
home.apply.step1.body: Company name, contact info, business address, and fleet base location.
home.apply.step2.title: Set your password
home.apply.step2.body: Create your account credentials. Everything is encrypted and secure.
home.apply.step3.title: We review your application
home.apply.step3.body: Our team checks your details. You'll hear back within one business day.
home.apply.step4.title: Account activated
home.apply.step4.body: Once approved, log in and complete your profile — add vehicles, set your radius, and go live.
home.apply.step5.title: Start receiving requests
home.apply.step5.body: Customers in your area will see your bids. Win your first booking and get paid directly to your bank account.
home.driver.title: Are you a driver?
home.driver.body: If your car hire company is already on Camel Global, your manager will have set up your driver account. Log in to see your assigned jobs, record fuel levels, and confirm insurance handovers.
home.customerSite.title: Experience the customer side
home.customerSite.body: Visit camel-global.com to see exactly what your customers see — the booking flow, vehicle request, and payment experience.
home.cta.title: Join Camel Global today
home.cta.body: No monthly fees. No lock-in. Works alongside your existing business. More bookings, delivered to your door.

onboarding.title: Get Started
onboarding.subtitle: Complete your setup to start receiving bookings.
onboarding.location.title: Fleet Base Location
onboarding.location.subtitle: Set the address your vehicles operate from. This determines which customer requests you receive.
onboarding.location.whyBody: Camel Global uses your fleet base location to match you with customers within your service radius. Only requests within your radius will be sent to you.
onboarding.location.searchHint: Or click the map below to drop a pin — fields fill automatically.
onboarding.location.pinLabel: Pin your exact location on the map
onboarding.location.pinHint: Click anywhere on the map — the address fields below will update automatically.
onboarding.location.radiusBody: A {{radius}} km radius means you will receive requests from customers within {{radius}} km of your base.
onboarding.currency.title: Bid & payout currency
onboarding.currency.subtitle: Set automatically from your country
onboarding.currency.whyBody: Your bid and payout currency is set from your business country when you connect Stripe payouts in the next step. Customers always pay in that currency — there's no conversion.
onboarding.currency.eur.label: Euro
onboarding.currency.eur.desc: Default for Spain and most of Europe
onboarding.currency.gbp.label: British Pound
onboarding.currency.usd.label: US Dollar
onboarding.billing.title: Business & Billing Details
onboarding.billing.subtitle: Your legal details are required for invoicing and commission processing.
onboarding.billing.whyBody: Camel Global takes a commission from each completed booking. Your VAT number and legal company name are required so we can issue correct cross-border commission invoices. Without a VAT number your account cannot go live.
onboarding.billing.commissionBody: Camel Global charges a 20% commission on the car hire price for each completed booking, with a minimum commission of €10 per booking. Fuel charges are passed through to you in full — we take no commission on fuel.
onboarding.billing.legalName.hint: Your full registered legal name — this appears on commission invoices.
onboarding.billing.regNumber.hint: Your company registration number from your country of incorporation.
onboarding.billing.vatNumber.hint: Your VAT, GST, ABN, or tax registration number for cross-border invoicing. Your account cannot go live without this.
onboarding.billing.secureBody: These details are used solely for commission invoicing and are never shared with customers.
onboarding.billing.err.vatNumber: VAT / Tax number is required. Your account cannot go live without this.
onboarding.fleet.title: Your Car Fleet
onboarding.fleet.subtitle: Add the vehicle categories you can offer to customers.
onboarding.fleet.whyBody: Customers request specific vehicle types. You will only receive requests that match the categories you add here.
onboarding.drivers.title: Your Drivers
onboarding.drivers.subtitle: Add the drivers who will deliver and collect vehicles for your customers.
onboarding.drivers.whyBody: Drivers meet customers at collection and return. Each driver needs an account to use the Camel Global driver app. Add at least one driver before going live.
onboarding.payouts.title: Set Up Payouts
onboarding.payouts.subtitle: Connect your bank account to receive payments from completed bookings.
onboarding.payouts.howBody: When a customer pays for their booking, funds are split automatically — Camel Global's commission goes to us, and your net amount (car hire minus commission, plus fuel) is held securely in your Stripe account. At the end of each month, all completed bookings are paid out to your bank account in one transfer.
onboarding.payouts.stripeBody: Payouts are handled securely by Stripe. You will be asked to provide your business details and bank account information directly with Stripe — Camel Global never sees your bank details.
onboarding.payouts.stripeInvoice: Monthly commission invoices are generated automatically and emailed to you.
onboarding.payouts.reviewing: Stripe is reviewing your details. This usually takes a few minutes. Use the refresh button below to check your status.
onboarding.payouts.notConnectedBody: Click below to set up your Stripe Express account. You will be redirected to Stripe and returned here when complete.
onboarding.payouts.connectedBody: Your Stripe account is set up and ready to receive payments.
onboarding.golive.title: Ready to Go Live?
onboarding.golive.subtitle: Review your setup and request activation when you are ready.
onboarding.golive.whyTitle: What happens when you go live?
onboarding.golive.whyBody: Once activated, customer requests within your service radius will be sent to you in real time. You will be able to submit competitive bids and start receiving bookings immediately.
onboarding.golive.allDoneBody: Your account is now live. You will start receiving customer booking requests immediately.
onboarding.golive.incomplete: A few things still to complete
onboarding.golive.incompleteBody: You can complete the remaining steps from your dashboard. Note: a VAT number and Stripe payout account are required before your account can go live.
dashboard.title: Partner Dashboard
dashboard.stripe.setupTitle: Set up payouts to receive booking payments
dashboard.stripe.setupBody: Connect your bank account via Stripe so you can receive your earnings from completed bookings. Takes about 5 minutes.
dashboard.stripe.activeBody: Completed bookings are paid out monthly to your bank account.

requests.detail.form.terms.body: If your bid includes a mileage limit or requires a security deposit, you must state this clearly below. These are arrangements between you and the customer — Camel does not collect these payments. The customer will see these terms on your bid and must agree to them before accepting.
requests.detail.form.terms.depositWarnin: You must arrange collecting the deposit directly with the customer at the point of pickup.

settings.delete.body2: If you have active bookings, please ensure they are completed or cancelled before deleting your account. For any questions

terms.title: Partner Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of the Camel Global platform as a partner. Please read them carefully. By registering as a partner and ticking the acceptance checkbox during signup, you agree to be bound by these Terms and the Partner Operating Rules, which are incorporated by reference.
terms.summary.marketplace.title: Camel is a marketplace
terms.summary.marketplace.body: We are an intermediary. The hire contract is always between you and the customer.
terms.summary.commission.title: Commission from 20%
terms.summary.commission.body: Standard rate is 20% on the hire price only. Fuel charges pass through to you at 100%. Minimum €10 per booking. Reduced rates available by agreement.
terms.summary.cancellation.title: Cancellation policy
terms.summary.cancellation.body: Partner cancellations = full refund to customer. Customer cancels >48hrs = full refund, no payout. Customer cancels <48hrs = you keep hire fee minus commission. Fuel always refunded.
terms.summary.stripe.title: No Stripe fees for you
terms.summary.stripe.body: Camel Global absorbs all Stripe processing fees. Your payout is always the full hire price minus commission, plus fuel charge. No hidden deductions.
terms.summary.currency.title: Your billing currency
terms.summary.currency.body: Your payout currency is set when you connect Stripe and cannot be changed. Customers always pay in your bid currency — no currency conversion applies to your payout.
terms.summary.transparency.title: Full fee transparency
terms.summary.transparency.body: Every booking shows the Stripe fee (borne by Camel) and your exact net payout in your reports and CSV exports so your accounts always reconcile.
terms.fee.label: Fee Summary — What you receive per booking
terms.fee.note: Fuel charges pass through 100% — no fees or commission apply to fuel. Camel Global absorbs all Stripe processing fees so your payout is always predictable. The exact Stripe fee for every booking is visible in your portal reports for transparency.
terms.rules.intro: The Partner Operating Rules are incorporated into this Agreement and have the same legal force as these Terms. They set out the day-to-day operational standards covering bidding, vehicle standards, fuel policy, driver conduct, customer service, cancellations, and more. You can read and download the Operating Rules from your
terms.footer: Camel Global Partner Terms and Conditions — Version {{version}} — Effective {{effective}} — Subject to change with 14 days' notice.
rules.title: Partner Operating Agreement
rules.intro: These rules govern your conduct as a Camel Global partner. By operating on the platform you agree to comply with all sections below.
rules.updated: Last updated April 2026 — subject to change with 14 days' notice.
rules.footer: Camel Global Partner Operating Agreement — Last updated April 2026 — Subject to change with 14 days' notice.
about.hero.title: Car hire that comes to you.
about.hero.body: We built Camel Global because picking up a hire car shouldn't mean queuing at an airport desk or taking a bus to an off-site depot. Your car should be waiting for you — exactly where you need it, exactly when you need it.
about.whatWeDo.title: What we do
about.whatWeDo.p1: Camel Global is a meet & greet car hire platform — think of it like Uber, but for car hire. Instead of the customer going to the car, a driver from a trusted local car hire company delivers it directly to the customer's chosen location: their hotel, their home, the airport arrivals hall, wherever works for them.
about.whatWeDo.p2: The customer tells us where they need a car, when, and for how long. We send their request to verified car hire partners within 30km of the pickup point. Partners compete for the business by placing bids. The customer picks the offer that suits them — on price, on car type, on rating — and the booking is confirmed instantly.
about.whatWeDo.p3: At the end of the hire, the driver collects the car from wherever the customer is. The customer pays only for the fuel they've actually used, calculated to the nearest quarter tank. No surprises, no hidden charges.
about.how.title: How it works
about.how.step1.title: Customer submits a request
about.how.step1.body: They enter their pickup location, drop-off point, dates, and car type.
about.how.step2.title: Partners receive the request
about.how.step2.body: Every verified partner within the customer's radius sees the request and can place a bid.
about.how.step3.title: Customer accepts a bid
about.how.step3.body: They choose the best offer. Booking confirmed instantly. You are notified immediately.
about.how.step4.title: Driver delivers the car
about.how.step4.body: Your driver delivers the car to the agreed location. Insurance confirmed on handover.
about.how.step5.title: Customer drives
about.how.step5.body: The customer enjoys their hire. Your driver collects from wherever they are when done.
about.how.step6.title: Fuel settled automatically
about.how.step6.body: Fuel is recorded at delivery and collection. The customer pays only for what was used. Payout calculated automatically.
about.why.title: Why Camel Global
about.why.p1: Traditional car hire is broken. Prices are opaque, pickup locations are inconvenient, and the experience at the desk is rarely pleasant. We believe there's a better way — one that puts customers in control, brings competition to their doorstep, and rewards good partners with good reviews.
about.why.p2: We're launching in Spain first, where meet & greet car hire is already in high demand but underserved by technology. We've built the platform to scale — with full support for EUR, GBP, and USD, so expanding internationally is straightforward when the time comes.
about.cta.title: Got a question?
about.cta.body: Questions about the platform, your account, or a partnership enquiry?
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what personal data {{company}} collects, why we collect it, how we use it, and what your rights are. If anything isn't clear, use our
privacy.s1.title: 1. Who we are
privacy.s1.p1: {{company}} is the operator of the Camel Global platform. We're registered in England & Wales (company number {{reg}}) with a registered address at {{address}}.
privacy.s1.p2: For the purposes of UK and EU data protection law, we are the data controller for the personal data described in this policy.
privacy.s2.title: 2. What data we collect
privacy.s2.customers.label: Customers
privacy.s2.customers.intro: When a customer creates an account or makes a booking we collect:
privacy.s2.customers.item2: Pickup and drop-off locations (including GPS coordinates where provided)
privacy.s2.customers.item3: Booking details — dates, car type, duration
privacy.s2.customers.item4: Fuel usage recorded at delivery and collection
privacy.s2.customers.item6pre: Technical data — IP address, browser type, pages visited (via cookies — see our
privacy.s2.partners.label: Partners (car hire companies)
privacy.s2.partners.intro: When you apply as a partner we collect:
privacy.s2.partners.item1: Business name, legal company name, and registration number
privacy.s2.partners.item3: Fleet base address and GPS coordinates
privacy.s2.partners.item5: Driver names and contact details you add to your account
privacy.s2.partners.item7: Booking and financial data related to your account
privacy.s2.drivers.label: Drivers
privacy.s2.drivers.body: Driver accounts are created by partners. We collect the name and login email assigned, along with job confirmation records linked to the bookings completed.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Why we collect it
privacy.s3.item2: Match customer requests with nearby partners
privacy.s3.item3: Send booking confirmations and status updates by email
privacy.s3.item4: Calculate fuel charges and partner payouts
privacy.s3.item5: Display reviews and ratings on partner profiles
privacy.s3.item7: Comply with our legal obligations (e.g. financial record-keeping)
privacy.s3.basis.mid: (we need your data to deliver the service you signed up for) and
privacy.s3.basis.end: (maintaining and improving the platform). Where we rely on your consent (e.g. analytics cookies), you can withdraw it at any time.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Who we share your data with
privacy.s4.intro: We don't sell your data. We share it only where necessary to run the service:
privacy.s4.item1body: — when a customer accepts a bid, the partner receives their pickup/drop-off location and booking details to fulfil the hire
privacy.s4.item2body: — our database and authentication provider (data stored in the EU)
privacy.s4.item4body: — location search and mapping (subject to Google's privacy policy)
privacy.s4.item7body: — aggregate site usage analytics (only if the user accepts analytics cookies)
privacy.s5.title: 5. How long we keep your data
privacy.s5.p1: We keep your account and booking data for as long as your account is active and for a reasonable period afterwards to comply with legal and financial obligations (typically 7 years for financial records).
privacy.s5.p2: If you delete your account, we immediately remove your ability to log in and flag your profile as deleted. Your booking and financial records are retained for the period required by law, then deleted.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.s6.intro: Under UK GDPR you have the right to:
privacy.s6.item1body: — request a copy of the data we hold about you
privacy.s6.item2body: — ask us to fix inaccurate data
privacy.s6.item3body: — ask us to delete your data (subject to legal retention obligations)
privacy.s6.item4body: — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s6.item5body: — object to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy.s6.item6body: — withdraw cookie consent at any time via the banner
privacy.s6.contact.pre: To exercise any of these rights, use our
privacy.s6.contact.end: . We'll respond within 30 days. You also have the right to complain to the ICO (ico.org.uk) if you believe we've mishandled your data.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Cookies
privacy.s7.body.pre: We use cookies for essential site functionality and, with your consent, for analytics. See our
privacy.s8.title: 8. Security
privacy.s8.body: We use industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), row-level database security, rate limiting on all authentication endpoints, and CAPTCHA on all sign-in and sign-up forms. No system is completely immune to attack, but we take reasonable precautions to protect your data.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
privacy.s9.body: We may update this policy from time to time. When we do, we'll update the effective date at the top. If changes are significant, we'll notify you by email.
privacy.s10.title: 10. Contact
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro.pre: This page explains what cookies are, which ones we use on the Camel Global platform, and how you can control them. If you have questions, use our
cookies.s1.title: What are cookies?
cookies.s1.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They're used for all sorts of things — from keeping you logged in, to understanding how people use a site so we can improve it. Some cookies are essential and the site won't work without them. Others are optional.
cookies.s2.title: Cookies we use
cookies.s2.essential.status: Always active — cannot be turned off
cookies.s2.essential.auth.title: Authentication cookies (Supabase)
cookies.s2.essential.auth.body: These keep you logged in to your account. Without them, you'd be signed out every time you navigate to a new page. They expire when your session ends or after a fixed period.
cookies.s2.essential.consent.title: Cookie consent preference (localStorage)
cookies.s2.essential.consent.body: Stores whether you've accepted or rejected non-essential cookies, so we don't ask you every time you visit. This is stored in your browser's local storage, not as a traditional cookie.
cookies.s2.analytics.status: Only set if you accept cookies
cookies.s2.analytics.title: Google Analytics (_ga, _ga_*)
cookies.s2.analytics.body: These help us understand how people use the site — which pages are popular, how long people spend on each page, and where they come from. The data is aggregated and anonymous. We use it to improve the platform. Google's own privacy policy governs how Google handles this data.
cookies.s3.title: How to manage your preferences
cookies.s3.intro: When you first visit the site, a banner at the bottom of the screen lets you accept all cookies or reject non-essential ones. If you change your mind:
cookies.s3.item1: Clear your browser's local storage for portal.camel-global.com and the banner will reappear
cookies.s3.item2: Use your browser's built-in cookie settings to delete or block cookies at any time
cookies.s3.item3: Visit your browser's privacy settings to manage advertising and analytics preferences
cookies.s3.note: Note: blocking essential cookies will break the login functionality of the platform.
cookies.s4.title: Third-party cookies
cookies.s4.body: Some features on this site use third-party services that may set their own cookies — including Google Maps (for location features) and hCaptcha (for bot prevention on sign-in forms). These services have their own privacy and cookie policies which we encourage you to review directly with those providers.
cookies.s5.title: Changes to this policy
cookies.s5.body: We may update this page as we add new features or change our analytics setup. The effective date at the top will always reflect the most recent version.
cookies.s6.title: Questions?
cookies.s6.body.end: and we'll get back to you.
